title: clausena harmandiana var. contracta
intro: Clausena harmandiana var. contracta, also known as the Clausena plant, is a species of flowering plant in the citrus family that is native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clausena harmandiana var. contracta include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Clausena harmandiana var. contracta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
